title:

planMd:
# Plan: Plan AI Tutor Assistant Feature Implementation

## Summary

Create a detailed task plan for building the AI Tutor Assistant with all specified features and modes

## Tasks

1. Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema
2. Implement AI Tutor Assistant Mode Selector Component (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema)
3. Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema, Implement AI Tutor Assistant Mode Selector Component)
4. Implement Topic-Aware Conversation Context Management (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema, Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support)
5. Create Friend Mode Chat Behavior and UI Enhancements (depends on: Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support, Implement AI Tutor Assistant Mode Selector Component)
6. Implement Teaching Mode with Step-by-Step Grammar and Vocabulary Lessons (depends on: Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support, Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema)
7. Add Socratic Tutor Mode with Guided Questioning Logic (depends on: Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support)
8. Develop IELTS Speaking Partner Mode with Questioning, Correction, and Band Estimation (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema, Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support)
9. Implement Writing Tutor Mode with Brainstorming, Outlining, Feedback, and Band Estimation (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema, Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support)
10. Add Reading and Listening Discussion Tutor Mode with Content Summarization and Exercises (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema, Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support)
11. Implement Smart Reminder Assistant with Local-First Notifications and In-App Reminders (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema)
12. Add Proactive Learning Suggestions Engine (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema, Implement Smart Reminder Assistant with Local-First Notifications and In-App Reminders)
13. Implement Context-Aware AI Prompt Construction with User Permission (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema)
14. Implement Assistant Memory Management with Local Storage and User Controls (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema)
15. Add Browser Extension Mini Tutor Assistant with Text Selection Features (depends on: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema)
16. Design and Implement AI Tutor Assistant Personality and UX Enhancements (depends on: Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support, Add Browser Extension Mini Tutor Assistant with Text Selection Features)
